landing.welcome: Welcome to Cooltra Ride Academy! This is an online learning platform with micro courses that teach you essential knowledge and helpful tips on riding your Cooltra eBike safely and following local traffic rules — all in a fun and engaging way. Let's get it right!
settings.title: Before we get started…
settings.subtitle: Traffic rules and regulations differ between countries. Choose your location so we can show the ones relevant for you.
overview.subtitle: Select a module to start your journey.
overview.courseDesc: The core course is divided into four modules. Finish them all to get a free ride at the end!
quiz.title: Quiz time!
quiz.intro: Let's see what you remember. Choose an answer and tap Check.
completed.title: Well done!
completed.body: You've now completed this module. Remember that you need to finish all modules of the course to complete it.
error.title: Oops!
error.body: Hm, something went wrong. Try again in a moment!
